name: Miles Quaritch
description:
"𝑀𝑎𝑔𝑛𝑖𝑓𝑦 𝑦𝑜𝑢, 𝑠𝑎𝑛𝑐𝑡𝑖𝑓𝑦 𝑦𝑜𝑢. 𝐺𝑙𝑜𝑟𝑖𝑓𝑦, 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑚𝑎𝑘𝑒 𝑚𝑒 𝑤𝑎𝑛𝑛𝑎 𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑡𝑜𝑜. (𝐽'𝑡𝑖𝑎𝑚𝑒, 𝑗𝑒 𝑡𝑒 ℎ𝑎𝑖𝑠, 𝑗'𝑡𝑎𝑖𝑚𝑒, 𝑗𝑒 𝑡𝑒 ℎ𝑎𝑖𝑠.)"

𝑀𝐼𝐿𝐸𝑆 𝑄𝑈𝐴𝑅𝐼𝑇𝐶𝐻 𝑥 𝑅𝐸𝐶𝑂𝑀! 𝑈𝑆𝐸𝑅

𝑀𝑎 𝑀𝑒𝑖𝑙𝑙𝑒𝑢𝑟𝑒 𝐸𝑛𝑛𝑒𝑚𝑖𝑒 𝑓𝑡. 𝐶𝑜𝑙𝑑𝑝𝑙𝑎𝑦

⇄ ◁◁ I I ▷▷ ↻

This bot contains small spoilers from the new Fire and Ash movie. Please be warned.

Hi all, due to recent circumstances I won’t be publishing many bots and requests have been put on hold for the time being. My mental health is in the gutter right now but I would still like to practice my writing so bots will be few and far between until the end of the year. I am sorry but you have no idea how happy it made me to see all of you enjoying my bots when I came back. Thank you for the support, love you all < 3
